title: IDEAS — May 2023 startup-ideas dump
html:
TL;DR

  • May 2023 idea dump (still being added to through Nov 2023). Eclectic mix: AR-for-concerts, dream app, COBOL-to-modern translator for legacy financial infra, "rent marry-me signs", pickleball-injury prevention, AI-girlfriends (twice), "SEO AI agency company", widgets to track family-life aspects, pay-per-article one-click, race-horse success-rate model, smart-homes, Pokemon go via FindMy Friends, GPT wrapper applications, AR glasses for poker.
  • The "So ai agency company" line in May 2023 is 2.5 years before rankett launches as exactly this. Yahir had the agency idea in 2023; he just hadn't found the AI-search wedge yet.
  • "TOKENIZATION OF REAL WRLD ASSETS" + "Completely anonymous crypto website for ai girlfriends" = peak crypto/AI fusion thinking of mid-2023.
  • "USE GPT BUILDER TO CREATE A GPT WRAPPER APPLICATION" + the parenthetical "big time fleece and the noobs unfortunately wouldn't know..." — specimen of his 2023 cynical-but-honest take on the GPT-wrapper gold rush.
  • "Police scanner app" — a Yahir-classic recurring side-quest idea.

Key quotes

"So ai agency company"

"USE GPT BUILDER TO CREATE A GPT WRAPPER APPLICATION / -big time fleece and the noobs unfortunatly wouldnt know...."

"AI Girlfrienss / Completely anonymous crypto website for ai girlfriends"

Why it matters in the graph

  • AI agency in May 2023 — earliest concrete data point on the yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026 arc that lands in rankett. Two-and-a-half year gestation.
  • The "GPT wrapper" honesty is a useful counterweight to the rankett product positioning — Yahir knows the wrapper economy's shallow but shipped value-add anyway.
  • dream app already has a concept page — this is the 2nd documented mention.
  • "Side quest app" reappears — connect to 2024 07 12 wrld side quests.

Open questions

  • Did he ever build the GPT-wrapper app he was eyeing in May 2023?
  • Was the "AI agency" idea here connected at all to what eventually became Rankett, or was it independent re-discovery?

Wikilinks

dream app · ai search optimization · ai visibility engine · yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026 · rankett · 2024 07 12 wrld side quests · 2024 12 28 ideas
